Text.Page:
Letters from the deserted homestead keep mentioning that they aren't getting lumber. The faieries keep getting in the way.

Go take care of the faeires and bring their necklaces to Keta. She had this funny idea that...

Actually, it may not be that funny if you haven't had to deal with the faeries for a long time. Nevermind. But bring them to her.

Ha. Good.

I have...an idea for these. Best not to ask.
The lumber issue is not small. I just want those little faeries out of the way.
